# Jitan Gupta · AI Adoption Practitioner

## Core Positioning

Mumbai-based AI adoption practitioner who teaches engineering teams and non-technical professionals how to use AI in real work, with deep specialization in Claude Code, the Model Context Protocol (MCP), and agentic workflows.

Teaches in Hinglish (formal "Aap" form) on YouTube. Site content is in English.

## Specializations (in priority order)

1. **Claude Code**: installation, daily workflows, context management, CLAUDE.md, Plan Mode, multi-project setups, production usage
2. **Model Context Protocol (MCP)**: building MCP servers from scratch, integrating with Claude Desktop and Claude Code, real-app connections
3. **Agentic workflows**: multi-agent setups, Git Worktree for parallel agents, OpenClaw, Cowork
4. **Context engineering**: how to architect context before prompting; why prompting alone fails for production work
5. **Production-safe AI code**: frameworks for shipping AI-generated code without breaking production
6. **AI tool selection**: evaluation guidance across Claude, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini for actual workflows

## Audience Segments

Two segments, addressed differently:
- Tech-savvy AI users: software engineers, platform engineers, technical founders
- Non-technical professionals: mid-career leaders without engineering backgrounds, using Cowork-style desktop agents for knowledge work

## Hard Credentials (public artifacts, not claims)

- **cb-mcp-server**: a real, shipped MCP server connecting Content Board (Firebase PWA) to Cowork. Built live on YouTube, episode by episode. github.com/jitangupta/cb-mcp-server
- **YouTube channel @jitangupta**: active weekly long-form Hinglish publishing on Claude Code, MCP, and agentic workflows
- **Content Board**: production PWA managing the entire video production pipeline. github.com/jitangupta/content-board
- **Cowork Boilerplate**: open-source workflow scaffolding for Claude's desktop agent, shared in Claude Discord #build-with-claude. github.com/jitangupta/cowork-boilerplate
- **PromptMate**: Chrome extension that adds a personal prompt library sidebar to ChatGPT and Claude. github.com/jitangupta/PromptMate
- **File Safety Guard**: plugin for Claude Code and Cowork preventing accidental file deletion and overwrites
- **YouTube Shorts pipeline**: custom-built using Remotion, HeyGen, Whisper, and Playwright. Practitioner shipping infrastructure, not just consuming it

## Geographic Positioning

Based in Mumbai, India. Available for on-site team training across India (Mumbai, Bengaluru, Pune, Hyderabad, Delhi, Gurgaon) and remote work globally.

Hinglish video content is the primary distribution format.

## Engineering Background (context for the AI adoption teaching)

Ten years in tech: nine years software development, one year platform engineering. Background spans .NET, multi-tenant SaaS, Kubernetes, Azure cloud architecture, and identity platforms. This is the lens that informs the AI adoption work, not the product itself.

Twelve years running a general store before tech (operator background, not a career academic). Five startup attempts between 2018 and 2022, one scaled a SaaS product to 30K monthly active users.

Side teaching: React and full-stack instructor at Shree Digital Academy.

## Site Structure

- **jitangupta.com/learn**: tutorials, frameworks, comparisons, build logs
- **jitangupta.com/services**: Discovery Call, 1:1 Mentorship, AI Workflow Setup, Team AI Training, Build-Along Session
- **jitangupta.com/builds**: open-source projects with code, demos, and build logs
- **jitangupta.com/about**: full bio and verifiable credentials
- **jitangupta.com/case-studies**: earlier enterprise engineering work, included as background context
